creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri May  9 03:41:03 2014
New Revision: 353390
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353390
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353390/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, silence post-patch:
  
  PR:		ports/189279
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/misc/p5-Business-ISSN/Makefile

Modified: head/misc/p5-Business-ISSN/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/p5-Business-ISSN/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:40:59 2014	(r353389)
+++ head/misc/p5-Business-ISSN/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:41:03 2014	(r353390)
@@ -7,13 +7,16 @@ CATEGORIES=	misc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl extension for International Standard Serial Numbers
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 
 post-patch:
-	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's,Business-ISSN,Business::ISSN,' ${WRKSRC}/${CONFIGURE_SCRIPT}
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's,Business-ISSN,Business::ISSN,' ${WRKSRC}/${CONFIGURE_SCRIPT}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
